inactive_process_model_delta_rows.summary: Stage cited document, file-rule, eligibility, fact, fee, and deadline deltas for reviewer evaluation.

document_deltas.reason: Plans may be required and must stay source-cited.

file_rule_deltas.reason: Plan drawings, applications, calculations, and supporting documents must be classified separately.

fee_caveats: Fee triggers are estimates only until source-cited PP&D fee review; payment workflows remain attended and exact-confirmation gated.
deadline_caveats: Deadlines and review periods require current source evidence and reviewer confirmation before being shown as case-specific guidance.
unsupported_path_handling: When a permit type is not supported by DevHub or requires email/manual intake, block automation and route to a manual handoff note.
devhub_reference_caveats: DevHub references are public or redacted surface descriptions only; no credentials, session state, screenshots, traces, HAR files, private values, uploads, submissions, scheduling, cancellation, certification, or payment artifacts are included.
reviewer_holds: Human review required before activating any ProcessModel delta row.
Human review required before relying on DevHub surface references for a user case.
rollback_notes: Reject the inactive delta rows and leave the active ProcessModel unchanged if validation fails or source evidence is stale.
